subcodes.first_line: O ye seekers after perfection! According to what Muhammad-'Ali Khan hath written, ye are engaged with the utmost enthusiasm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالبان تحصیل کمال از قراریکه محمد علیخان مرقوم نموده در نهایت شوق اشتغال
subcodes.subjects: @excellence; distinction, @past, present and future of Iran, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to acquire knowledge; sciences, @high station of learning, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge
